LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_FMJ.label: 5.5x50mm Liberty (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_FMJ.description: Small, high-velocity rifle bullet used in a variety of Super Earth-made assault weapons, primarily the AR-23 family of bullpup assault weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_AP.label: 5.5x50mm Liberty (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_AP.description: Small, high-velocity rifle bullet used in a variety of Super Earth-made assault weapons, primarily the AR-23 family of bullpup assault weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_HP.label: 5.5x50mm Liberty (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_HP.description: Small, high-velocity rifle bullet used in a variety of Super Earth-made assault weapons, primarily the AR-23 family of bullpup assault weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_Incendiary.label: 5.5x50mm Liberty (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_Incendiary.descripti: Small, high-velocity rifle bullet used in a variety of Super Earth-made assault weapons, primarily the AR-23 family of bullpup assault weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_HE.label: 5.5x50mm Liberty (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_HE.description: Small, high-velocity rifle bullet used in a variety of Super Earth-made assault weapons, primarily the AR-23 family of bullpup assault weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_Sabot.label: 5.5x50mm Liberty (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_55x50mmLiberty_Sabot.description: Small, high-velocity rifle bullet used in a variety of Super Earth-made assault weapons, primarily the AR-23 family of bullpup assault weapons.
